verdict.note: north star, live: a natural-language request -> the meta-agent harness emits a structured harness spec -> the deterministic harness_ops tool builds a genuinely new harness on the GA control plane, which reaches READY and answers a real invoke. Delegation is in-process here (Gateway MCP wiring is M4); the build/verify mechanism is real end-to-end.
